name: @ngflow/monorepo
description: A highly customizable Angular library for building node-based editors and interactive flow charts

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ngflow/system run build && pnpm --filter @ngflow/angular run build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @ngflow/system run lint && pnpm --filter @ngflow/angular run lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ngflow/system run typecheck && pnpm --filter @ngflow/angular run typecheck
scripts.publish:ngflow: pnpm --filter @ngflow/system publish --access public && pnpm --filter @ngflow/angular publish --access public
